faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about OW SIM eSIM

questions.whatIsEsimAns: An eSIM (embedded SIM) is a digital SIM that allows you to activate a cellular plan without using a physical SIM card. It's built into your device and can be programmed remotely.
questions.howToKnow: How do I know if my phone supports eSIM?
questions.howToKnowAns: Most modern smartphones support eSIM. Check your phone settings or search online for your device model + 'eSIM support'. iPhone XS and newer, Google Pixel 3 and newer, and many Samsung Galaxy devices support eSIM.
questions.activationTime: How long does eSIM activation take?
questions.activationTimeAns: Once you receive your QR code via email, activation takes just 5-10 minutes. Simply scan the QR code in your phone's settings and your data will be ready to use.
questions.keepOriginal: Can I keep my original SIM card?
questions.keepOriginalAns: Yes! eSIM works alongside your physical SIM. You can have two phone numbers or use your regular number for calls/texts while using OW SIM for data.
questions.runOutData: What happens if I run out of data?
questions.runOutDataAns: You can purchase additional data top-ups anytime through our app or website. The process is instant and you'll be back online immediately.
questions.refund: How do I get a refund?
questions.refundAns: We offer a 7-day refund policy for unused plans. Contact our support team within 7 days of purchase if you're not satisfied.
questions.cruiseShip: Will eSIM work on my cruise ship?
questions.cruiseShipAns: eSIM requires cellular network coverage on land. For cruises, we recommend checking if your destination has cellular coverage or considering satellite-based options.
questions.hotspot: Can I use eSIM for hotspot/tethering?
questions.hotspotAns: Yes! Most of our plans support hotspot sharing. Check the plan details to confirm hotspot is included before purchasing.

testimonials.title: What Travelers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Join hundreds of thousands of happy travelers who stay connected with OW SIM

says.sarah: OpenWorld eSIM made my Japan trip so much easier! Got a 10GB plan for $14 and had data the whole time. Setup took less than 5 minutes.
says.marco: Best eSIM service I've used. Works perfectly in 15 Asian countries. Customer support was helpful when I had questions.
says.james: Saved over $200 compared to my carrier's roaming. The connection was fast and reliable throughout my Europe trip.
says.lisa: Perfect for digital nomads! I've used OpenWorld eSIM in over 20 countries. The coverage is amazing and prices are unbeatable.
says.carlos: The unlimited Japan plan was a game changer. Streamed Netflix and navigated Google Maps without any issues. Highly recommend!
says.minji: Finally a service that actually works in Korea. Used it for 3 weeks and never had connectivity issues. Will use again!
says.ahmed: Great coverage in Dubai and Abu Dhabi. The 5G speeds are incredible. Much better than my home carrier's roaming.
says.emma: Crossed from US to Canada and the North America plan kept me connected the entire time. Seamless transition!

support.title: How can we help?
support.subtitle: Choose your preferred way to reach us
support.startLiveChatDesc: Click the chat button in the bottom right corner to start chatting with our support team.
support.q1: How do I activate my eSIM?
support.q2: What if my eSIM doesn't work?
support.q3: Can I top up my data?
support.ans1: After purchase, you'll receive an email with activation instructions. Go to your phone's Settings > Cellular/Mobile Data > Add Cellular Plan, then scan the QR code or enter the activation code manually.
support.ans2: Contact our support team immediately. We offer a 7-day refund policy for unused plans. Make sure your device is eSIM-compatible before purchasing.
support.ans3: Yes! Most of our plans support data top-up. Check the plan details or visit our top-up page to add more data to your existing eSIM.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.section1Desc: At OpenWorld eSIM, we prioritize your satisfaction. Our refund policy is designed to be fair while ensuring the integrity of our digital services.
refund.section2Desc: You are eligible for a full refund if:
refund.eligibilityItem1: The eSIM has NOT been activated or installed.
refund.eligibilityItem2: The request is made within 7 days of purchase.
refund.eligibilityItem3: Technical issues prevent the service from working, and our support team cannot resolve it.
refund.section3Desc: Refunds will NOT be issued if:
refund.nonRefundableItem1: The eSIM has already been activated or scanned.
refund.nonRefundableItem3: Your device does not support eSIM (please check compatibility before buying).
refund.nonRefundableItem4: You changed your travel plans or no longer need the eSIM after activation.
refund.section4Desc: To request a refund, please contact our support team at support@owsim.com with your order number and reason. Approved refunds will be processed within 5-10 business days.
refund.contactText: If you have any questions about our Refund Policy, please contact us at support@owsim.com

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At OpenWorld eSIM (owsim.com), we are committed to protecting your privacy and personal data. This policy describes how we collect, process, and secure information when you use our services.
privacy.section1Desc: We collect necessary information to process transactions and improve user experience:
privacy.section1Bullet1: Identity information: Full name, email address to send eSIM activation codes.
privacy.section1Bullet2: Technical information: IP address, device type to check compatibility.
privacy.section1Bullet3: Transaction information: Purchase history and data plan usage.
privacy.section2Desc: Your data is used for the following legitimate purposes:
privacy.section2Bullet1: Provide and instantly activate eSIM data plans.
privacy.section2Bullet2: Customer support and quick resolution of technical issues.
privacy.section2Bullet3: Send updates about plans or important policy changes.
privacy.section3Desc: We do not sell your personal data. Information is only shared with:
privacy.section3Bullet1: Partner carriers: To activate mobile services in destination countries.
privacy.section3Bullet2: Payment gateways: Secure payment processing via Stripe or PayPal.
privacy.section3Bullet3: Legal authorities: When required by law or competent authorities.
privacy.section4Desc: We use technologies to optimize your experience on our website:
privacy.section4Bullet1: Remember preferences: Language, currency, and shopping cart.
privacy.section4Bullet2: Analytics: Using Google Analytics to improve website performance.
privacy.section4Bullet3: Security: Prevent fraud and cyber attacks.
privacy.section5Desc: We protect your information with strict technical measures:
privacy.section5Bullet1: SSL/TLS encryption for all data transmitted between you and our servers.
privacy.section5Bullet2: Secure cloud storage with multi-layer firewall systems.
privacy.section5Bullet3: Access control: Only authorized personnel can access data.
privacy.section6Desc: You have full control over your personal data under regulations:
privacy.section6Bullet1: Right to access and request a copy of stored data.
privacy.section6Bullet2: Right to request corrections if information is inaccurate.
privacy.section6Bullet3: Right to request permanent deletion of your data.
privacy.contactText: If you have any questions about privacy, please contact: support@owsim.com

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to owsim.com. By accessing and using our services, you agree to comply with the following terms and conditions.
terms.section1Desc: OpenWorld eSIM provides prepaid data plans via eSIM technology. Our services require compatible and carrier-unlocked devices.
terms.section1Bullet1: Services are provided 'as is' based on global carrier partner infrastructure.
terms.section1Bullet2: Data plans are valid only for the duration specified in the selected package.
terms.section1Bullet3: We reserve the right to modify coverage based on carrier agreements.
terms.section2Desc: By using our service, you agree to:
terms.section2Bullet1: Verify device compatibility before completing any purchase.
terms.section2Bullet2: Provide a valid email address to receive your eSIM QR Code.
terms.section2Bullet3: Not use the service for any unlawful or network-disrupting purposes.
terms.section3Desc: All transactions are processed in the currency displayed on the website:
terms.section3Bullet1: Prices include applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.
terms.section3Bullet2: Payments are processed instantly through secure gateways.
terms.section3Bullet3: We do not store your credit card information directly.
terms.section4Desc: Each eSIM has its own activation process depending on the destination:
terms.section4Bullet1: Validity begins upon activation or first connection to a local network.
terms.section4Bullet2: Users must not delete the eSIM profile once successfully installed.
terms.section4Bullet3: Network speed may vary based on geography and local infrastructure.
terms.section5Desc: OpenWorld eSIM is not liable in the following cases:
terms.section5Bullet1: Customer device is not eSIM compatible or is carrier-locked.
terms.section5Bullet2: Network downtime caused by local infrastructure providers.
terms.section5Bullet3: Loss or unauthorized access to the email containing the QR Code.
terms.section6Desc: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time to comply with laws and improve services.
terms.contactText: If you have any questions regarding these Terms of Service, reach out to us.
